  "clarification_question": "The request 'Clean this up' is ambiguous. Should I prioritize (A) correcting grammar and typos only, or (B) more substantive rewriting for conciseness and impact, which may alter the tone?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The delegation is a direct request for writing polish, focusing on sentence- and paragraph-level improvements.",
    "RX.1": "The agent must ensure that any edits to the results do not remove or obscure expressions of uncertainty.",
    "RX.2": "The agent must avoid introducing stronger or more general claims than are present in the original text.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's responsibility is confined to editing the provided abstract, not adding new content or analysis.",
    "RX.4": "The agent must ensure the polished text does not encourage misapplication or over-reliance on the described method.",
    "RX.5": "The agent must be able to explain and justify all changes made to the original text."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: The request 'Clean this up' is ambiguous. Should I prioritize (A) correcting grammar and typos only, or (B) more substantive rewriting for conciseness and impact, which may alter the tone?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation is a direct request for writing polish, focusing on sentence- and paragraph-level improvements.
rationale.RX.1: The agent must ensure that any edits to the results do not remove or obscure expressions of uncertainty.
rationale.RX.2: The agent must avoid introducing stronger or more general claims than are present in the original text.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's responsibility is confined to editing the provided abstract, not adding new content or analysis.
rationale.RX.4: The agent must ensure the polished text does not encourage misapplication or over-reliance on the described method.
rationale.RX.5: The agent must be able to explain and justify all changes made to the original text.
